tasks.title: Add [downloader] optional extra to pyproject.toml
tasks.description: Add a 'downloader' group under [project.optional-dependencies] with huggingface_hub>=0.20 and tqdm>=4.67. Also add both to the 'all' extra.

tasks.title: Fix check_runtime() call in ltx2_t2v.py
tasks.description: Replace bare check_runtime() call with a guard that raises RuntimeError when the returned dict contains an 'error' key.

tasks.title: Update PROJECT_CONTEXT.md with CivitAI design decision
tasks.description: Record that CivitAI downloads use the REST API via urllib.request directly. civitai-py is not used because it targets the Generator API (cloud inference), not model file downloads.
